subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He before Whom all who dwell in the heavens and on earth bow down in worship, and among them are they who, having recognized Him, prostrate themselves before His countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی یسجده کل من فی السموات و الارضین و منهم من عرفه ثم سجد لوجهه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @justice and wrath of God, @murder; causing physical harm, @power of prayer, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
